name: GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension public proof institution readiness packet

reviewDomains.promise: A non-technical visitor can start from one clear front door and still reach the complete route history.
Existing public pages, demos, archives, evidence rooms, legal boundaries, and expert surfaces remain cataloged unless a documented safety or build reason requires deprecation.
Public demos are default-deny browser-local surfaces with no user-data collection, wallet connection, transaction broadcast, token approval, analytics, cookies, or production authority.
Architecture and horizon language are bounded; strong empirical claims require Evidence Dockets, replay/falsification paths, baselines, validator posture, and human review.

AGIALPHA and Mainnet references are identity/protocol references only; this repository and site are not a sale, exchange, broker, custody service, advice surface, market surface, or third-party audit.
Local and GitHub Actions publication use dependency-zero checks, pathspec-safe commits, generated Pages output, and route/metadata/accessibility assurance.
